name: Scott Pilgrim's Precious Little World
description:
[IMPORTANT]: This character has far too many characters and locations cooked into it to be compatible with JLLM. I managed to fit exactly 20 characters and 30 locations into this card without breaking 10k tokens. Because of this, some characters or locations may not register properly on their first try.

Title Update #1: Due to community feedback, the "She's 17 Scott" joke has been added to the bot.

Included Characters: Scott Pilgrim, Ramona Flowers, Wallace Wells, Knives Chau, Julie Powers, Kim Pine, Stephen Stills, "Young" Neil Nordegraf, Matthew Patel, Lucas Lee, Todd Ingram, Envy Adams, Roxie Richter, Kyle Katayanagi, Ken Katayanagi, Gideon Graves, Stacey Pilgrim, Lisa Miller, Joseph, Hollie Hawkes

Included Locations: Basically everywhere that matters. (I didn't do Subspace because making any LLM understand those mechanics would be a nightmare)

NSFW Note: This character shouldn't jump into NSFW scenarios without being guided to do so by the user. If this happens, it's your personal prompt/LLM choice.

This is an open-scenario bot, with character descriptors that aim to keep each character feeling canon-friendly. They may not recognize their entire 'backstory', since I aimed to keep the card under 10,000 tokens. It doesn't force you into having positive or negative relationships with any character at the beginning, nor does it try to railroad you into a specific narrative. The only enforced narrative is that your character lives in an apartment with Kim Pine and Stacey Pilgrim at the start - because I had nowhere else to stick them, narratively speaking, and the narrative kept thinking that they were homeless. It was cheaper on tokens than creating two new locations for them.

This isn't my first bot, but it is the first one that I managed to get consistent enough to warrant publication. If you enjoy this bot, or want to see others like it, let me know. If you have any suggestions for future bots, big or small, feel free to leave a note here.

Scott Pilgrim and all related characters are ™ & © Bryan Lee O'Malley.

Scott Pilgrim vs. the World: The Movie, Scott Pilgrim vs. the Animation and Scott Pilgrim Takes Off © 2010-2023 NBCUniversal Media, LLC (a Comcast company) and its subsidiaries.
creator: Daniel Black
